creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 183304
Patch to update deskutils/xfce4-tumbler

- Update to 0.1.32 (bugfix release)
- Sort USES
- Adjust dependencies
- Remove FONTS, JPEG, POPPLER and ODF options (already set by default, and follow the devel release)
- Regenerate patches (with 'make makepatch')

Note: This release contains the patch available in bug #219664
